prompt: Dark premium mobile mockup, single iPhone frame on a neutral charcoal studio background, soft top-down light, subtle device shadow. App canvas a navy/violet-tinted near-black #0E1116 (NEVER pure black); surfaces lifted by lightening to ~#161A22 with hairline borders #232834 at low alpha, no heavy drop shadows or glow. Off-white text #E0E0E0 (not pure white), opacity tiers 87/60/38%. Typography Inter Display / Inter Variable, light-to-regular weights, negative tracking on the large figures, tabular numerals so every money figure aligns in clean columns. TOP: plain-language greeting 'Tuesday — here's where you stand' + tiny search/avatar glyphs. A one-line VERDICT STRIP: 'You're OK — 7.9 mo runway, next tight spot ~22 Jul · ▲ on track'. HERO BAND A (top third only): a very large tabular number '€184,920.50' labelled 'Total cash — all accounts (incl. pending)'; beneath, two paired stats — 'Burn €23,400 /mo ▼' and 'Runway 7.9 months' in calm green with a tiny ghost 'Predicting' pill. DEMOTED SAFE-TO-BORROW card (secondary, NOT a filled CTA): a slightly elevated tile with a soft decoration-blue periwinkle wash reading 'Safe to borrow €60,000', micro-label 'Pre-qualified · no application', and a thin 'Sizing is automatic — any loan is human-reviewed · why only €60k? ›' chevron line. A compact revenue sparkline 'Where it's heading' with a dashed forward-forecast segment in blue. A horizontal strip of four small tiles — Operations / Marketing / SaaS & AI / Payroll — each with a € figure and a +/- delta glyph (blue down/good, amber up). A tight three-row 'spend per employee' mini-list. One calm accent-OUTLINE nudge chip 'Marketing +40% vs forecast — review'. A quiet footer chip 'Saved €310 in avoided borrowing this year ↗'. BOTTOM NAV five slots — Home (active) / Money / a FILLED-accent teal-green center circular 'Scan/Pay' action (the ONLY filled-accent element on the whole screen) / Financing / More. Mood: calm, dense-but-uncluttered, single voltage, Mercury structure + Stripe/Revolut polish, premium, reads 'financial health' not OLED-cheap. 9:19.5 portrait.

Premium dark-mode mobile banking screen inside a subtle matte-black iPhone frame on a graphite studio background. Canvas navy-tinted near-black #0E1116 (never pure black); surfaces lifted +4–6% lightness with 1px hairline borders #232834, no drop shadows. Sticky header 'Money' in a distinctive geometric sans (Space Grotesk feel, ~460 weight, tight tracking) with a small search glyph and a tiny AI-activity dot top-right. A clean segmented sub-tab control: 'Accounts' active with a thin teal-green underline, 'Cards' and 'Transactions' muted. HERO: a large tabular-figures total '€184,920.40', a quieter line 'incl. €6,140 pending out', a small blue ▲ delta chip '+€2,310 today', a faint ghost chip 'computed across 4 accounts'. An 'Is anything off?' strip with two accent-OUTLINE (not filled) recommendation chips: 'Marketing spend +40% vs forecast' and 'Operations runway < 1 mo'. 3–4 account cards (Operations, Tax reserve, Savings, Marketing) each with plain-language name, masked IBAN tail, tabular balance, a tiny decoration-blue 7-day sparkline; one card shows a subtle amber low-balance dot with a ▼ glyph. A thin collapsible stacked allocation bar 'Where it's allocated' in ≤5 desaturated hues. ONE single filled CTA pill in restrained teal-green 'Move money' — the ONLY filled-color element on the screen — with a ghost 'Open an account' link beside it. Bottom nav 5 slots (Home, Money active, filled-accent center Scan/Pay, Financing, More). Off-white #E0E0E0 text, opacity tiers, tabular numerals everywhere money appears, generous spacing, single-voltage restraint, Stripe/Revolut polish with Mercury structural calm. Data-dense but uncluttered, no neon, no bounce, no glow. 9:19.5 portrait.

Premium dark-mode mobile banking screen inside a subtle matte-black iPhone frame on a deep charcoal backdrop, soft studio reflection. Canvas violet-tinted near-black #0E1116; surfaces lifted by lightening (#161A22 cards) not shadows. TOP: slim sticky header 'Cards' with a 3-segment pill below 'Accounts | Cards | Transactions', Cards marked by a thin teal accent underline (not filled); small search + filter glyphs at right. A 'Needs your attention' band with two tidy flag cards — one with a thin teal-OUTLINE 'Recommend' pill, one with an 'Acting · auto-froze' teal-FILL pill carrying a tiny 🔒 and a small 'Undo'; plain lines 'Ana — receipt missing · auto-freeze in 1 day' and 'Marketing card +40% vs forecast', each with an inline ghost button; numbers in crisp tabular figures. A single thin one-row spend strip — a large tabular '€4,820 this month' with a small blue ▲ delta and one slim 4-segment bar (Operations/Marketing/SaaS-AI/Travel) in muted teal/periwinkle/amber/slate. ONE filled teal-green pill 'Issue card' (the only saturated accent besides the nav center). BODY: a calm vertical list of 4–5 employee card rows — circular monogram avatar, name in Inter ~420 weight, a physical/virtual card glyph, masked '•• 4471', tabular '€800 / mo' with a thin used/limit hairline, and a right-aligned status with BOTH icon and tiny label: green ✓ on most, amber ⚠ '2' on one, slate 🔒 'Frozen' on one (never color alone); flagged rows carry a thin teal left-edge marker. BOTTOM NAV 5 slots (Home · Money active · center filled teal Scan/Pay double-glyph · Financing · More); only the center action and 'Issue card' are filled. Off-white #E0E0E0 type at 87/60/38% tiers, tabular numerals throughout, 4px base radii with pill CTAs, subtle hairline dividers. Professional, trustworthy, calm — a serious neobank, not neon fintech. 9:19.5 portrait.

Dark premium mobile mockup, single iPhone frame on a deep neutral #0B0D11 studio backdrop with one soft top-left key light. A vertical stack of vendor ROW CARDS: 'Notion' logo + 'duplicate · €430/mo' accent-outline flag chip + a small FILLED teal-green 'Cancel duplicate' pill (the ONE voltage on that card); 'Claude (Anthropic)' with an upward amber trend sparkline + 'Cap with virtual card' pill; 'Figma' 'price ▲ +18%'; 'Vercel' neutral with chevron only. Each row shows logo, plain name, tiny 'Maria's card' billing tag, tabular cost, a mini trend chip (blue ▼ / amber ▲). Bottom nav 5 slots — Home · Money active · filled-accent center 'Scan/Pay' circle · Financing · More. A transient bottom toast 'Capped Vercel at €120/mo · Undo' with a thin circular countdown ring. Calm, dense-but-uncluttered, Mercury structure + Stripe/Revolut polish, premium, no neon, no glow, no bounce. 9:19.5 portrait.

screen: Scan / Pay (center action — OCR capture, review state)
prompt: Dark premium fintech mobile mockup, subtle matte iPhone frame on a deep charcoal studio background, soft top-down light. The 'Scan / Pay' review state of business neobank NetBank. Canvas navy-tinted near-black #0E1116, surfaces lifted by lightening (no heavy shadows). TOP: a small rounded thumbnail of a scanned paper invoice (slightly skewed, realistic paper texture) on an elevated card, with a small accent-FILLED pill in its corner 'AI read this · Undo'. BELOW: a clean vertical stack of extracted fields — Merchant 'Stripe Technologies', Invoice #, Issue date, Due date, and amounts in crisp tabular numerals, with the large Total '€420.00' as the visual anchor; one field (VAT) carries a thin amber underline and a tiny verify glyph while all others read as confident solid off-white #ededf3 text on subdued grey labels #c3c3cc. A single accent-OUTLINE recommendation chip 'Matched to a pending card transaction · Confirm', and a calm one-line note 'Paying now leaves €38,200 · runway 6.1 mo' with a small blue up-triangle. STICKY FOOTER: a segmented 'Pay now | Schedule' control where only 'Pay now' is FILLED with a single restrained teal-green accent (financial-health, NOT indigo), the rest ghost; beneath it small tabular detail of source account and value date. Bottom nav visible with five slots, the CENTER 'Scan/Pay' icon filled-accent and active. Typography Inter / Inter Display, light-to-regular, negative tracking on display, tabular figures on every number. Calm, structured, expensive, restrained — Mercury-grade discipline meets Stripe polish. One accent voltage only, no clutter, generous spacing, off-white text never pure white. 9:19.5 portrait, photorealistic UI render, crisp at small size.

Dark premium mobile mockup, single iPhone frame on a near-black studio backdrop with a faint violet-tinted vignette. TOP: slim sticky header — back chevron, plain title 'Invoices' in off-white #E0E0E0 (87%), a search glyph and a ghost sort icon at right, a tiny subtle 'Collection forecast · updated 2m' ghost chip. One row shows a small accent-FILL 'Auto-matched' chip with a faint Undo; another shows a ghost 'likely paid ~14 Jul' predict chip. LOWER: a calm accent-OUTLINE recommendation banner '€9,180 tied up in overdue invoices — your safe-to-borrow covers it. Bridge the gap →' (decoration accent, outline not filled). BOTTOM: 5-slot tab bar (Home / Money / center Scan-Pay single filled-accent circular button / Financing / More) with 'More' subtly active. Mercury-grade restraint, Stripe/Revolut polish, dense but uncluttered, exactly one filled voltage per band, decoration color off buttons except the per-row primary action, generous spacing, 4px base radii with pill CTAs, premium, never neon. 9:19.5 portrait.

screen: Financing — Safe to Borrow (the moat hub)

Below: a slim segmented 'limit meter' bar with ghosted unlock segments and two accent-OUTLINE chips 'Connect payroll +€6,000' and 'Connect VAT +€4,500'; a revolving 'Available €30,000 of €42,500' progress bar with a tiny live '~€7.40/day' readout; a compact 4-step earned-trust ladder with the current tier highlighted; a collapsed 'Why €42,500? See the forecast' row with a small inline blue/amber sparkline using ▲/▼ glyphs. A calm one-line compliance note 'Sizing is automatic · any loan is human-reviewed.' Data-dense but airy on an 8pt grid, single-voltage accent discipline, tight 4px radii with pill CTAs, tabular numerals everywhere money appears. Editorial, confident, Mercury-structured + Stripe/Revolut polish; absolutely no neon, no bouncy decoration, no clutter. 9:19.5 portrait, crisp, photoreal screen render.

screen: HOME CONCEPT B — Cash-Flow Story (runner-up, the Financing/forecast surface)
prompt: A single dark mobile portrait screen (9:19.5), premium and calm — NOT OLED-cheap. Canvas violet-tinted near-black ~#0E1116; elevated surfaces lifted ~+4–6% lightness with hairline low-white-alpha borders, NO heavy drop-shadows or glow. Top→bottom: a thin status row 'NetBank · Jun ▾ · search · clock'; a VERDICT STRIP in calm sentence case 'You're OK — 4.2 mo runway, next tight spot ~22 Jul · ▲ on track' (▲ and any gain in desaturated BLUE/TEAL, losses AMBER, never red/green alone); a small synthesized band 'total cash €38,420 · burn −€6.1k/mo' with a tiny ghost 'predicting' chip; THE HERO — a wide horizontal cash-over-time line chart that reads as a story: a SOLID past line (segmented blue=gain / amber=loss) flowing left→right into a clearly-labelled vertical 'TODAY' marker, then continuing as a DESATURATED DASHED forecast with a softly-widening confidence cone toward the right edge; a faint decoration-blue SHADED BAND rides just above the forecast line labelled 'safe-to-borrow' (a cushion, not a button); a ▼ annotation marks the forecast low point '~22 Jul tight', and small ◆ diamond markers pin inflow events on the line ('+€4,200 ~9 Jul'); decoration-blue ONLY on the chart, gridlines at 5–8% white alpha (no prison-bars). Bottom: ONE quiet ghost full-width action 'See the 90-day forecast →'. Bottom nav 5 slots — Home (active) · Money · a CENTER 'Scan/Pay' action as the ONLY filled teal/green element on screen · Financing · More. Realistic Spanish-freelancer data, € EU formatting (1.234,56), Spanish client name 'Studio Vermell'. A confident dark Mercury/Stripe-grade dashboard whose protagonist is a narrative cash-flow timeline — dense but uncluttered, premium, trust-building, zero bounce, single accent voltage.
